# Voice Profile

*This file is auto-generated by AuthorAgent when you run "Learn my style from [your manuscript]".*
*You can also manually edit it.*

<!--
  This is the SHIPPED TEMPLATE. The live file, workspace/soul/VOICE-PROFILE.md,
  is gitignored because once analyzed it contains YOUR personal writing
  fingerprint and should never be committed. On first run, copy this file to
  VOICE-PROFILE.md (or just run "Learn my style" and AuthorAgent creates it).
-->

## Status: Not Yet Analyzed

To create your voice profile, send AuthorAgent a sample of your writing (at least 5,000 words recommended) and say:

> "Learn my style from this"

AuthorAgent will analyze your writing and populate this profile with:

- **Sentence Patterns**: Average length, variation, rhythm
- **Vocabulary Level**: Complexity, favorite words, unique phrases
- **Paragraph Structure**: Length, transitions, white space usage
- **Dialogue Style**: Tag preferences, rhythm, subtext usage
- **Narrative Voice**: Distance, intimacy, humor, tone
- **Pacing Patterns**: Scene length, chapter hooks, tension curves
- **Signature Moves**: The things that make YOUR writing yours

Once generated, AuthorAgent will use this profile to match your voice in all drafting and revision work.
